description.ko: 압도적인 수압 속에서 살아남기 위해 스스로 빛을 내는 생명체들이 존재하는, 고요한 심해의 풍경.
description.en: A peaceful look into the dark depths of the ocean, where life creates its own light to survive the crushing pressure.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-detailed shot of AQUA-5, titled 'The Bioluminescent Abyss.' A cluster of translucent, organic research pods submerged in the #000080 midnight zone. Massive #40E0D0 turquoise jellyfish with flowing tendrils drift past, pulsing with internal light. The #006994 deep sea water is thick with marine snow and #48D1CC cyan micro-bubbles. High-tech floodlights from the pods illuminate the jagged, mineral-rich ocean floor. 8k resolution, photorealistic fluid dynamics, capturing the peaceful and mysterious dance of life in the high-pressure deep.
